name: compute_customer_360
payload:
-- Customer 360 aggregation from Oracle ERP
SELECT
  c.CUSTOMER_ID,
  c.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || c.LAST_NAME AS FULL_NAME,
  NVL(c.EMAIL, 'unknown@company.com') AS EMAIL,
  NVL2(c.PHONE, c.PHONE, 'N/A') AS PHONE,
  DECODE(c.STATUS, 'A', 'Active', 'I', 'Inactive', 'S', 'Suspended', 'Unknown') AS STATUS_LABEL,
  TO_CHAR(c.CREATED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_DATE_STR,
  TO_DATE(c.LAST_LOGIN, 'DD-MON-YYYY') AS LAST_LOGIN_DATE,
  SYSDATE AS SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  NVL(o.ORDER_COUNT, 0) AS TOTAL_ORDERS,
  NVL(o.TOTAL_REVENUE, 0) AS LIFETIME_REVENUE,
  NVL(w.SESSION_COUNT, 0) AS WEB_SESSIONS,
  LISTAGG(o.PRODUCT_CATEGORY, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY o.PRODUCT_CATEGORY) AS PRODUCT_CATEGORIES,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.REGION ORDER BY NVL(o.TOTAL_REVENUE, 0) DESC) AS REGION_RANK
FROM CRM_CUSTOMERS c
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    CUSTOMER_ID,
    COUNT(*) AS ORDER_COUNT,
    SUM(TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
    MAX(PRODUCT_CATEGORY) AS PRODUCT_CATEGORY
  FROM ERP_ORDERS
  WHERE ORDER_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12)
  GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID
) o ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = o.CUSTOMER_ID
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    USER_ID AS CUSTOMER_ID,
    COUNT(*) AS SESSION_COUNT
  FROM WEB_SESSIONS
  WHERE SESSION_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3)
  GROUP BY USER_ID
) w ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = w.CUSTOMER_ID
WHERE c.STATUS != 'D'
ORDER BY LIFETIME_REVENUE DESC
